GitHub VS Code Pybricks Teams
Checkpoint 3

The Goal

Zaki
Our goal was to detect the color of a sample and carry it to the correct sorting area on the mat.
01
Detect color
Red or green — while picking up
02
Grab it
Claw closes on detection
03
Navigate
Gyro-based, no drifting
04
Sort it
Drop in the correct zone
1
Drive forward
→
2
Detect color
→
3
Grab sample
→
4
Run mission
→
5
Drop off
On the mat

The Mission

Zaki
The robot picks up a colored sample from the first pickup position, detects its color, and navigates to the correct sorting zone to drop it off.
Step 1 — pickup zone
Red sample in position
Robot approaches slowly, color sensor scanning.
Step 2 — detected & grabbed
Zone is now empty
Claw closed, robot carrying it to the red zone.
The arena
WRO 2026 competition mat
Color-coded sorting squares — red, green, brown, blue, yellow.
Sorting zones
All 4 colors ready
Code already supports yellow & blue — ready for CP4.
The build

Our Robot

Front view
Side — claw visible
Gear system
Claw front
Inside the claw
Claw mechanism
Engineering

Robot Design

Osaid
We kept our box-shaped robot from Checkpoint 2. Motors on the outside give us more room in the middle. The biggest change: the claw is stronger, wider, and the sensor now sits on top facing down.
■
Box chassis
Stable. Motors outside = space for claw inside.
◆
Upgraded claw
Wider grip. Stiffer frame. No more drops.
○
Gear-driven
3 gears transfer motor power smoothly.
▲
Sensor ON the claw
Detects color while grabbing. Saves time every run.
Programming

The Code

Mikaeel
Our program is split into separate files — one for each color. We used GitHub to stay in sync, and VS Code's AI assistant only when really needed — and we always understood every fix.
sample_detector.py
# Creep forward, detect, grab, dispatch
if detected in SAMPLE_COLORS:
  grabber.close(30)
  mission = _mission_for_color(detected)
  mission.run()
gyro_move_straight.py
# Correct heading every 10ms
error = normalize180(heading - initial)
steer = clamp(-kp * error, -60, 60)
robot.drive(speed, steer)
main.pyEntry point
sample_detector.pyDetect + dispatch
red_artifact.pyRed mission
green_artifact.pyGreen mission
yellow_artifact.pyReady for CP4
blue_artifact.pyReady for CP4
gyro_move_straight.pyPID nav
gyro_turn.pyPrecise turns
grabber.pyClaw control
What changed

Key Upgrades

Navigation
Gyro over line following
No more random drifting.
Mechanical
Stronger claw
Wider, stiffer — no drops.
Sensing
Sensor on the claw
Detect and grab at the same time.
Code
One file per color
Easy to add more colors later.
Teamwork
GitHub repo
Everyone always has the latest code.
Accuracy
Yaw reset mid-run
Stops heading errors stacking up.
